## Assign an activy code: different processes

![](../img/formality-claim-survey.png){fig-align="center"}

::: notes

– Thanks to a literal description of the activity of the enterprise during an
administrative procedure
● The most important one : when an enterprise is set up, a form is filled
in and a large amount of information is sent to Insee. This includes a
literal description of the activity by the firm
● New forms can be transmitted if the enterprise changes its activity
– Claims : if the enterprises disagree with the activity code given by Insee
– Surveys : structural statistical surveys (the so-called ESA, EAP) in
which enterprises are asked about the breakdown of their activity
:::

## Assign an activy code: two outcomes

- Automatic coding
- Human review

![](../img/orga-post-prod-en.png){fig-align="center"}

## Near-ubiquity of ML

![](../img/automation_rate.png){fig-align="center"}

## Automatic activity classification 

![](../img/automatic-coding-HMI.png){fig-align="center"}

## Human review

![](../img/reprise_gestionnaire_manque_contexte.png){fig-align="center"}

## Model

- [**Text classification**]{.orange} model which uses additional categorical variables
- Historically, a system expert named [**SICORE**]{.orange} as automatic label coding system
- First ML usecase with [**fastText**]{.orange} library
- Originally trained on legacy data annotated partly by the [**coding engine**]{.orange} and partly [**manually**]{.orange}
